items.title: Built for schools

items.title: End to end
items.text: One partner from first idea to final delivery. No juggling five suppliers.

items.title: Celebration-ready
items.text: We make the big days feel big, with the small details handled.

founder.heading: A word from our team
founder.quote: At Eduhub, we treat every competition, order, and graduation as if it were our own — because for your students, it's a day they'll remember. One team handles it end to end, in Arabic and English, so your staff never have to chase five suppliers. Our commitment is simple, and we put it in writing: a fair price, delivered on time, to a standard you'll be proud of, with a real person who answers within one business day.
founder.name: The Eduhub Team

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps — from first message to a day that runs itself.

steps.title: Enquire
steps.text: Tell us what your school needs in one short message.

steps.title: Plan & quote
steps.text: We reply within one business day with a clear plan and a quote.

steps.title: Delivered
steps.text: We supply, set up, and run it — you enjoy the day.

items.title: On time
items.text: We agree your dates in writing and meet them — uniforms, gowns, and setup arrive exactly when promised.

items.title: High quality
items.text: Every item and every event is checked to a standard you'll be proud to put in front of students and parents.

items.title: Fair price
items.text: Clear, honest pricing with no hidden extras — a quote you can build a budget around.

items.title: Reply within one business day
items.text: Send an enquiry and a real person gets back to you within one business day.

items.a: Every package is priced to your school's size, dates, and choices, so you only pay for what you need. Tell us the essentials and we'll send clear, itemised pricing — with no obligation.

items.q: How far ahead should we book?
items.a: For graduations and large events, four to six weeks gives us room to do it properly; uniforms, gifts, and smaller activities can move faster. Tell us your date and we'll confirm what's comfortable.
It depends on the item — uniforms and gowns have practical minimums, while events are sized to your group. Share your numbers and we'll tell you exactly what works.
We invoice your school directly and agree clear payment terms in the quote before anything begins — no surprises later.

items.q: What happens on the day of the event?
items.a: Our team is on-site to set up, run, and pack down, so your staff can focus on your students and enjoy the day.

items.q: Which schools and areas do you serve?
items.a: We're based in Istanbul and work with international and private schools across the city, in both Arabic and English. Not sure if we cover you? Just ask.

channels.title: Talk to a real person
channels.subtitle: Reach us whichever way suits you — we reply within one business day.
channels.note: Based in Istanbul. We usually reply within one business day.

finalCta.title: Ready to plan your next school event?
finalCta.subtitle: Send one message. We'll reply with a plan and a quote — usually within a business day.
finalCta.note: No obligation. No pressure. Just a clear plan for your school.

privacy.metaDescription: How Eduhub collects, uses, and protects your personal data under Türkiye's KVKK and the GDPR.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Eduhub ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects personal data when you visit our website or contact us. We are based in Istanbul, Türkiye, and we handle personal data in line with Türkiye's Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK, Law No. 6698) and, where it applies, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.heading: Who we are
body: Eduhub provides activities, school services, and graduation services to schools, and is the data controller for the personal data described in this policy.
For any question about your data, or for our full legal entity details, contact us at eduhub.contact26@gmail.com.

sections.heading: Information we collect
body: When you submit our contact form we collect the details you provide: your name, your school's name (optional), your email address, your phone number (optional), and the message you send us.
We also store one functional cookie that remembers your chosen language (Arabic or English). We do not use advertising or behavioural tracking cookies.

sections.heading: Why we use your information
body: We use your details only to respond to your enquiry, prepare a plan and a quote, and stay in touch about the service you asked about.
Our legal basis is your consent in sending us an enquiry, together with our legitimate interest in responding to schools that contact us. We never sell your data or use it for unrelated marketing.

sections.heading: How your information is stored
body: Your enquiry is stored securely in our database, which is hosted by Supabase acting as our data processor. Access is limited to authorised Eduhub team members.
We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against loss, misuse, or unauthorised access.

sections.heading: How long we keep it
body: We keep enquiry data only as long as we need it to respond to you and to keep reasonable business records, after which we delete or anonymise it.

sections.heading: Sharing your information
body: We do not share your personal data with third parties, except service providers who help us operate the website (such as our hosting and database provider) and where we are required to do so by law.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Under the KVKK (Article 11) and the GDPR you have the right to access your personal data, to have it corrected or deleted, to restrict or object to its processing, and to withdraw your consent at any time.
To exercise any of these rights, email us at eduhub.contact26@gmail.com and we will respond within the time the law allows.

sections.heading: Cookies
body: We use a single functional cookie to remember your language preference. It does not track you across other websites. If we add analytics in the future, we will update this policy first.

sections.heading: Children's privacy
body: Our website is aimed at schools and their staff, not at children. We do not knowingly collect personal data directly from children.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
body: We may update this policy from time to time. The effective date at the top of this page shows when it was last revised.

sections.heading: Contact us
body: For any privacy question or request, email eduhub.contact26@gmail.com or call +90 552 471 86 00.

terms.metaDescription: The terms that apply when you use the Eduhub website and contact us about our school services.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern your use of the Eduhub website. By using this site you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

sections.heading: About Eduhub and this website
body: Eduhub is based in Istanbul, Türkiye, and provides activities, school services, and graduation services to schools. This website presents our services and lets schools send us an enquiry.
Catalogue listings describe what we offer and are for general information. Any prices shown are indicative; the exact scope and price of a service are confirmed in a written quote.

sections.heading: Enquiries and quotes
body: Sending us an enquiry through the contact form is a request for information, not an order, and does not create a binding contract.
A binding agreement is formed only when we and your school both confirm a written quote for a specific service.

sections.heading: Using the site
body: You agree to use this website lawfully and not to misuse it, disrupt it, or attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of it or its underlying systems.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: The content, design, branding, and the Eduhub name and logo on this site are owned by or licensed to Eduhub. You may not copy, reproduce, or reuse them without our written permission.

sections.heading: Accuracy of information
body: We work to keep the information on this site accurate and up to date, but we do not warrant that it is complete or error-free, and our services and listings may change without notice.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Eduhub is not liable for any indirect or incidental loss arising from your use of, or inability to use, this website.

sections.heading: Governing law
body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Türkiye, and any dispute relating to them or to this website is subject to the courts of Istanbul.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the site after a change means you accept the updated terms.

sections.heading: Contact us
body: For any question about these terms, email eduhub.contact26@gmail.com or call +90 552 471 86 00.
